summary: Iteration 26: Complete testing of NEW features - Provider Dashboard Financial Widget, Sales Distribution Widget, and Notification System. ALL 19/20 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. ALL FRONTEND FEATURES VERIFIED.
passed_tests: Provider login works (boutique@sportlyo.fr / boutique123)
Provider dashboard loads with all 6 tabs: Catalogue, Finances, Ventes, Logos, Commandes, Messages
GET /api/provider/financial-breakdown returns 200 with correct data
Financial breakdown returns by_organizer, total_sales, total_commission, net_revenue
Financial breakdown organizer data includes organizer_id, name, orders_count, total_sales, total_commission, net_revenue
Financial breakdown requires authentication (401/403 without token)
GET /api/provider/sales-breakdown returns 200 with correct data
Sales breakdown returns top_products, by_category, by_size arrays
Sales breakdown top products include product_id, name, quantity, revenue
Sales breakdown categories have name/value structure
Sales breakdown requires authentication (401/403 without token)
GET /api/notifications returns 200 with notifications array and unread_count
GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns 200 with unread_count
POST /api/notifications/read returns 200 and marks notifications as read
Notifications endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Provider catalog endpoint works (Catalogue tab)
Provider stats endpoint works (dashboard summary cards)
Provider orders endpoint works (Commandes tab)
Provider conversations endpoint works (Messages tab)
Participant login works (pierre@test.com / test1234)
Participant dashboard loads with hub and all 7 sections
Notification bell visible in provider dashboard header
Notification bell visible in participant dashboard header
Notification panel opens when bell is clicked (provider)
Notification panel opens when bell is clicked (participant)
Finances tab: 3 summary cards (Ventes totales 196€, Commissions dues 25€, Revenu net 171€)
Finances tab: Commission breakdown per organizer (Club Sportif Paris with 5 orders)
Finances tab: Margin percentage displayed (87.2% marge nette)
Ventes tab: Top products bar chart (T-shirt Finisher as top product)
Ventes tab: Category pie chart (Textile: 5, Sac: 1)
Ventes tab: Size distribution visualization (M, S, L, XXL)
Ventes tab: Revenue table with totals (6 units, 190.00€)

success_rate.backend: 95% (19/20 tests passed, 1 skipped - participant user_id fetch)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26: New provider financial/sales widgets and notification system fully tested. Key NEW endpoints: GET /api/provider/financial-breakdown (commission per organizer), GET /api/provider/sales-breakdown (top products, categories, sizes), GET /api/notifications (user notifications), GET /api/notifications/unread-count, POST /api/notifications/read. Provider has 5 orders from 'Club Sportif Paris' with 196€ total sales, 25€ commissions, 171€ net revenue. Top product is 'T-shirt Finisher' (5 units, 175€). Categories: Textile (5), Sac (1). Sizes: M (2), S (2), L (1), XXL (1). Notifications created on message send and order creation.
mocked_api_note: SumUp payment integration is MOCKED/simulated - orders are created with simulated payment status
